name: Cirrus
description: Mare’s-tail clouds combed thin across a high sky — every redraw re-brushes the streaks at a softer or steeper sweep.

code.style: --wisp: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2)); --rule: ( /* each streak repeats once via its shadow, like combed filaments */ --cs: calc(@r(90, 140) * 1px / @Y); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: @rand(-6%, 30%); top: @rand(10%, 56%); width: @rand(50%, 92%); height: calc(28px / @Y); border-radius: 99px; background: var(--wisp); opacity: @rand(0.55, 0.95); filter: blur(calc(6px / @Y)); transform: rotate(@rand(-9deg, -3deg)); box-shadow: calc(@var(--cs) * -0.6) @var(--cs) var(--color2); transition: ease 800ms; } } @random(0.5) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: @rand(10%, 44%); top: @rand(64%, 84%); width: @rand(30%, 60%); height: calc(20px / @Y); border-radius: 99px; background: var(--color1); opacity: @rand(0.4, 0.8); filter: blur(calc(6px / @Y)); transform: rotate(@rand(-8deg, -2deg)); transition: ease 800ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
